chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No.S-42 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of MA 1393/2024 3.For hearing of main case Mr. Sajjad Hussain Kolachi, Advocate for applicants. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G for the State. Date of Hearing & Order: 26-04-2024 O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J.- Applicants are standing trial in a Sessions Case No.986 of 2016 (re: State-Versus Ghulam Sarwar & others), arising out of Crime No.08 of 2016, registered at P.S, Hingorja, for offences under sections 322, 337H, 147,148 & 149 PPC, pending before the Court of 4th Additional Sessions Judge/GBV Court, Khairpur. They have filed this application for its transfer to any other Court having jurisdiction on the ground that they have lost faith upon Presiding Officer, who is issuing threats to them to settle the matter with the complainant party. Therefore, complainant party is pronouncing that they have got a support from the Presiding Officer. These grounds have been reiterated by learned counsel in arguments, which, however, have been opposed by learned Deputy P.G. 2. I have heard learned counsel for parties and perused the material placed on record. No tangible proof has been placed on record by the applicants that the Presiding Officer is interested in the case and prejudicial against them. Mere bald allegations against the Presiding Officer have been made without any force, as there is no shred of evidence in this regard. Therefore, I find no force in this application, which is accordingly dismissed along with listed application.
